raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Trust for Public Land plans to conserve Banning Ranch by converting a 385-acre parcel of land into a public park and nature preserve.",
    "The new park and preserve will provide access to open space for nearly 9 million Californians who live within an hour's drive of Banning Ranch.",
    "This project will cultivate a model for low-carbon, climate-resilient coastal protection.",
    "By conserving Banning Ranch, the project will make strides towards achieving the state’s climate change resiliency goals.",
    "The project aims to improve the area's adaptability to sea level rise.",
    "The initiative is expected to reduce the oil footprint by over 90%.",
    "The conservation efforts will accelerate the natural removal of carbon in the environment.",
    "The Banning Ranch Park and Preserve aims to promote park access for diverse disadvantaged communities.",
    "The project will honor Native American cultural heritage.",
    "Educational and recreational programs will be provided as part of the project.",
    "The restoration of coastal wetlands is intended to help combat climate change."
  ]
}
```
